description: Style Note Built with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit that athletes demand, these nike running shorts come in a body-friendly design and keep you fresh all day. Team it with t-shirts and track jackets superior style.Product Details Black shorts, has an elasticated waist with a drawcord, contrast stitch detailing on the side seams, two side pockets, one back pocket with a velcro closure, branding at the back and left legMaterial and Care 100% cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on print/decoration
